en-IN.name: GestureControl
en-IN.summary: Control Alexa using hand gestures captured by a webcam.
en-IN.description: Gesture-Based Multimodal Control System for Smart Voice Assistants. MSRIT CSP67 project. Control smart home, music, and more using hand gestures.
examplePhrases: Alexa, ask gesture control to play music
Alexa, ask gesture control to turn on lights

en-US.name: GestureControl
en-US.summary: Control Alexa using hand gestures captured by a webcam.
en-US.description: Gesture-Based Multimodal Control System. Control smart home, music, and more via hand gestures.
examplePhrases: Alexa, ask gesture control to play music

publishingInformation.testingInstructions: Use the Alexa Developer Console simulator or a physical Echo device linked to the developer account.
